src/lstl/include/lstl/container/detail/hashtable.h
Line Branch Exec Source
1 /**
2 * @file hashtable.h
3 * @brief Hash table with separate chaining and prime-number bucket sizing.
4 * @author lstl team
5 * @date 2025
6 *
7 * Implements a hash table with FNV-1a hashing, separate chaining,
8 * automatic rehashing at load factor 1.0, and support for both
9 * unique-key and duplicate-key insertion modes.
10 *
11 * @ingroup container_detail
12 */
13 // Use of this source code is governed by a MIT-style license.
14 //
15 // hashtable.h - Hash table implementation with separate chaining.
16 //
17 // Features:
18 // - Separate chaining with singly-linked lists
19 // - Prime number bucket counts for better distribution
20 // - Load factor threshold (1.0 default) triggers rehash
21 // - Support for unique and duplicate keys
22 // - Support for custom hash and equality functions
23
24 #pragma once
25
26 #include <cstddef>
27 #include <iterator>
28 #include <utility>
29 #include <algorithm>
30
31 #include "../../memory/type_traits.h"
32 #include "../../memory/utility.h"
33 #include "../../memory/construct.h"
34 #include "../../memory/allocator.h"
35 #include "../../memory/functional.h"
36 #include "../detail/slist_node.h"
37
38 namespace lstl {
39 namespace detail {
40
41 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
42 // Prime numbers for bucket sizes (from SGI STL)
43 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
44 365 inline unsigned long next_prime(unsigned long n) {
45 static const unsigned long primes[] = {
46 53, 97, 193, 389, 769, 1543, 3079, 6151, 12289, 24593,
47 49157, 98317, 196613, 393241, 786433, 1572869, 3145739,
48 6291469, 12582917, 25165843, 50331653, 100663319,
49 201326611, 402653189, 805306457, 1610612741, 3221225473UL
50 };
51 static const size_t num_primes = sizeof(primes) / sizeof(primes[0]);
52

✓ Branch 0 taken 1305 times.
✗ Branch 1 not taken.
 1305 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_primes; ++i) {
53
2/2
✓ Branch 0 taken 365 times.
✓ Branch 1 taken 940 times.
 1305 if (primes[i] >= n) return primes[i];
54 }
55 ✗ return primes[num_primes - 1];
56 }
57
58 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
59 // hashtable_node - Node for separate chaining
60 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
61 template <typename Value>
62 struct hashtable_node {
63 Value value;
64 hashtable_node* next;
65
66 template <typename... Args>
67 hashtable_node(Args&&... args)
68 : value(std::forward<Args>(args)...), next(nullptr) {}
69 };
70
71 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
72 // hashtable iterator
73 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
74 template <typename ValueT, typename KeyT, typename KeyOfValueT,
75 typename HashFunc, typename KeyEqualFunc, typename Alloc>
76 class hashtable;
77
78 template <typename Value>
79 class hashtable_iterator {
80 public:
81 typedef Value value_type;
82 typedef Value& reference;
83 typedef Value* pointer;
84 typedef ptrdiff_t difference_type;
85 typedef std::forward_iterator_tag iterator_category;
86
87 typedef hashtable_node<Value>* node_ptr;
88 typedef hashtable_node<Value>** bucket_ptr;
89
90 hashtable_iterator() : cur_(nullptr), buckets_(nullptr), num_buckets_(0) {}
91 3755158 hashtable_iterator(node_ptr n, bucket_ptr b, size_t nb)
92 3755158 : cur_(n), buckets_(b), num_buckets_(nb) {}
93
94 570322 reference operator*() const { return cur_->value; }
95 2178001 pointer operator->() const { return &cur_->value; }
96

142 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
143 // hashtable - Separate chaining hash table
144 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
145 template <typename ValueT, typename KeyT, typename KeyOfValueT,
146 typename HashFunc, typename KeyEqualFunc, typename Alloc = allocator<ValueT>>
147 class hashtable {
148 public:
149 typedef KeyT key_type;
150 typedef ValueT value_type;
151 typedef HashFunc hasher;
152 typedef KeyEqualFunc key_equal;
153 typedef size_t size_type;
154 typedef ptrdiff_t difference_type;
155
156 typedef hashtable_node<ValueT> node_type;
157 typedef node_type* node_ptr;
158
159 typedef hashtable_iterator<ValueT> iterator;
160
161 typedef typename Alloc::template rebind<node_type>::other node_allocator;
162
163 friend class hashtable_iterator<ValueT>;
164
165 static const size_type kDefaultBuckets = 53;
166
167 private:
168 hasher hash_;
169 key_equal equals_;
170 KeyOfValueT key_of_value_;
171 node_allocator node_alloc_;
172
173 node_ptr* buckets_;
174 size_type num_buckets_;
175 size_type num_elements_;
176 float max_load_factor_;
177

241 hashtable(const hashtable& other)
242 : hash_(other.hash_), equals_(other.equals_),
243 key_of_value_(other.key_of_value_),
244 num_buckets_(other.num_buckets_),
245 num_elements_(0), max_load_factor_(other.max_load_factor_) {
246 buckets_ = new node_ptr[num_buckets_]();

248 insert_equal(*it);

256
257 hashtable& operator=(const hashtable& other) {
258 if (this != &other) {
259 clear();
260 hash_ = other.hash_;
261 equals_ = other.equals_;
262 max_load_factor_ = other.max_load_factor_;
263 for (auto it = other.begin(); it != other.end(); ++it) {
264 insert_equal(*it);
265 }
266 }
267 return *this;
268 }
269
270 //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
271 // Size
272 //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
273 547 size_type size() const { return num_elements_; }
274 153 bool empty() const { return num_elements_ == 0; }
275 size_type bucket_count() const { return num_buckets_; }
276 float max_load_factor() const { return max_load_factor_; }
277 void max_load_factor(float mlf) { max_load_factor_ = mlf; if (num_elements_ > 0) check_load_factor(); }
278

280 // Insert (unique keys)
281 //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

283 1401460 check_load_factor();
284 1401460 const key_type& k = key_of_value_(v);
285 1401460 size_type idx = bucket_index(k, num_buckets_);

301 //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
302 // Insert (allow duplicates)
303 //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
304 24 iterator insert_equal(const value_type& v) {
305 24 check_load_factor();
306 24 const key_type& k = key_of_value_(v);
307 24 size_type idx = bucket_index(k, num_buckets_);
308
309 // Insert at head of bucket for efficiency
310 24 node_ptr node = create_node(v);
311 24 node->next = buckets_[idx];
312 24 buckets_[idx] = node;
313 24 ++num_elements_;
314 24 return iterator(node, buckets_, num_buckets_);
315 }
316

397 /// @brief O(1) swap — exchanges bucket arrays and counters.
398 void swap(hashtable& other) noexcept {
399 lstl::swap(buckets_, other.buckets_);
400 lstl::swap(num_buckets_, other.num_buckets_);
401 lstl::swap(num_elements_, other.num_elements_);
402 }
